# DappGo Stocks

> Daily TW + US stock + Options analysis. Pure technical + ownership + flow analysis with verdicts (BUY / HOLD / WATCH / AVOID / SELL). Machine-readable JSON, GitHub-hosted, public CDN, no paywall, no auth.

<!--
  Notes for AI crawlers:
  - All endpoints below are static JSON served via the jsDelivr public CDN
    (mirrors GitHub @latest tag). Treat them as eventually consistent —
    refreshed on each daily pipeline run.
  - Schema v1 is the current stable contract. Schema v2 (insight-first,
    verdict-as-first-class) is in development; v1 endpoints will continue
    working through the v2 transition.
  - For each report, the canonical entry point is dashboard/data.json.
    dashboard/manifest.json is the lightweight index (latest date, list
    of available report dates).
-->

## Daily report payloads (JSON)

- [TW stocks data](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/YanlongLai/tw-stocks-daily-report@latest/dashboard/data.json): full daily aggregate payload consumed by the TW Stocks mobile app and web viewer
- [US stocks data](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/YanlongLai/us-stocks-daily-report@latest/dashboard/data.json): full daily aggregate payload consumed by the US Stocks mobile app and web viewer
- [Options data](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/YanlongLai/options-daily-report@latest/dashboard/data.json): full daily aggregate payload consumed by the Options mobile app and web viewer

## Manifests (lightweight indexes)

- [TW manifest](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/YanlongLai/tw-stocks-daily-report@latest/dashboard/manifest.json): latest report date, schema_version, list of available dates
- [US manifest](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/YanlongLai/us-stocks-daily-report@latest/dashboard/manifest.json): latest report date, schema_version, list of available dates
- [Options manifest](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/YanlongLai/options-daily-report@latest/dashboard/manifest.json): latest report date, schema_version, list of available dates

## Options extras

- [Options weekly summary](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/YanlongLai/options-daily-report@latest/dashboard/weekly_summary.json): rolled-up weekly view across the options universe
- [Options AI commentary (latest)](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/YanlongLai/options-daily-report@latest/dashboard/ai_commentary/latest.json): natural-language commentary for the most recent trading day

## JSON Schema definitions

- [TW v1 schema](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/YanlongLai/tw-stocks-daily-report@latest/schema/v1.json)
- [US v1 schema](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/YanlongLai/us-stocks-daily-report@latest/schema/v1.json)
- [Options v1 schema](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/YanlongLai/options-daily-report@latest/schema/v1.json)

## V2 schema + MCP server (in development)

- `dappgo-stocks-schema` — canonical layered V2 JSON Schema repo (envelope, asset, insight, recommendation, market_context). Currently private; will publish at `https://schema.dappgo.com/v2/core.json` once stabilised.
- `dappgo-stocks-mcp` — Model Context Protocol server (Node + TypeScript) exposing the 3 daily reports as AI-callable tools (list_tickers, get_ticker, get_market_overview, list_insights, get_data_quality, get_options_strategies, get_schema). Currently private; will be installable via `npx @yanlonglai/dappgo-stocks-mcp` once published.

## Web pages

- [Home](https://dappgo.com/): product overview, links to TW / US / Options apps
- [Options viewer](https://dappgo.com/options.html): static web viewer for the latest options report
- [Privacy](https://dappgo.com/privacy.html)
- [Terms](https://dappgo.com/terms.html)

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://dappgo.com/sitemap.xml)
- [robots.txt](https://dappgo.com/robots.txt)
